# SmartPetGuide

> Research-backed reviews of smart pet devices. Based on verified owner data and real-world analysis.

## About

SmartPetGuide provides honest, research-backed reviews of automatic pet feeders, self-cleaning litter boxes, smart water fountains, pet cameras, and GPS trackers. We analyze thousands of verified Amazon reviews to find the best pet tech, with no sponsored placements.

## Key Pages

### Best Lists
- [7 Best Self-Cleaning Litter Boxes of 2026](https://smartpetguide.net/best/self-cleaning-litter-boxes/) — Researched & reviewed
- [Best Automatic Cat Feeders](https://smartpetguide.net/best/automatic-cat-feeders/) — Smart feeding for every budget
- [Best Stainless Steel Cat Fountains](https://smartpetguide.net/best/stainless-steel-cat-fountains/) — Hygienic hydration
- [Best Smart Pet Fountains](https://smartpetguide.net/best/smart-pet-water-fountains/) — App-connected hydration
- [Best Pet Cameras](https://smartpetguide.net/best/pet-cameras/) — Check in from anywhere
- [Best GPS Trackers (No Monthly Fee)](https://smartpetguide.net/best/gps-trackers-no-monthly-fee/) — Real-time tracking
- [Best Pet Cameras Without Subscription](https://smartpetguide.net/best/pet-cameras-no-subscription/)
- [Best Automatic Feeders for 2 Cats](https://smartpetguide.net/best/automatic-feeders-for-2-cats/)
